Off Calendar Jun-26-2023 Off Calendar

Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendments Based On Undue Influence
Off Calendar May-08-2023 Continued To Jun-26-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Amy Harrington appearing via zoom for Wendy Garfield (petitioner).
Angie Lam appearing via zoom for Jonathan Rivin (trustee).

Mrs. Harrington stated that they have a final draft of a settlement which needs to be recirculated and that it will require court approval. The Petition to invalidate trust amendments etc., is continued to June 26, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of a petition for approval of settlement agreement is also set for June 26, 2023.

Judge; Ross Moody; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Choi; Not reported.
